hero.title: Early Lupus Detection,
hero.subtitle: Upload a photo of your skin. Our computer vision model analyzes potential Lupus indicators in seconds.
hero.disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Not a medical diagnosis.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to get your results
howItWorks.step1Desc: Take or upload a clear photo of the affected skin area for analysis.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our computer vision model examines the image and provides a confidence score.
howItWorks.step3Title: Consult with AI on Your Results
howItWorks.step3Desc: Discuss your results with our AI assistant for deeper symptom consultation.

features.title: What Lupustic Offers
features.subtitle: Comprehensive tools for early detection and understanding
features.f1Desc: Advanced image analysis powered by a trained deep learning model that examines skin lesion patterns associated with Systemic Lupus Erythematosus.
features.f2Desc: Receive a clear confidence percentage alongside your results, helping you understand the strength of the AI's assessment at a glance.
features.f3Desc: After your scan, consult our AI assistant to discuss symptoms, learn about next steps, and understand your results in plain language.
features.f4Desc: Easily monitor your health and get reminders to stay consistent with your care.

builtForEveryone.title: Built for everyone
builtForEveryone.subtitle: Healthcare screening shouldn't be complicated or expensive
builtForEveryone.f1Desc: AI detection comparable to clinical screenings performed by specialists
builtForEveryone.f2Desc: Instant AI analysis means you don't have to wait days for screening results
builtForEveryone.f3Desc: Your health data is encrypted and never shared without your consent
builtForEveryone.f4Desc: Costs a fraction of traditional screenings, making prevention accessible to all
builtForEveryone.f5Desc: Reach underserved communities and remote areas without clinical access
builtForEveryone.f6Desc: No invasive procedures - just take a photo and let AI do the rest

whyEarlyScreening.title: Why Early Screening Matters?
whyEarlyScreening.subtitle: Lupus: The Silent Threat You Shouldn't Ignore
whyEarlyScreening.s1Desc: people worldwide are affected by Lupus
whyEarlyScreening.s2Desc: Average delay in achieving proper lupus diagnosis
whyEarlyScreening.s3Desc: Access in rural areas. Screening not available in remote communities

disclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: This tool is <not>NOT</not> a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult a licensed physician for any medical concerns. Results generated by our AI model are for informational purposes only and should not be used as the sole basis for any medical decisions.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, or invest in your health with a plan that covers all your screening needs.
pricing.premiumDesc: Everything you need for comprehensive monitoring

scan.title: Skin Analysis
scan.subtitle: Take a photo or upload an image of the affected skin area for AI-powered analysis
scan.takePhotoDesc: Open your camera to capture the affected skin area
scan.uploadGalleryDesc: Drag & drop or click to browse — JPEG, PNG, WebP up to {max}MB
scan.invalidType: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.

symptomChecker.title: Symptom Check
symptomChecker.subtitle: Check the symptoms you are experiencing. Click to expand details for each symptom.
symptomChecker.submitNote: Symptom check results will be used by AI to provide more accurate consultations.
symptomChecker.feverWarning: No cough, pain when urinating, diarrhea, or festering wounds. Not suffering from cancer. Not occurring after taking medication.
symptomChecker.feverSubRecurring: Has been going on for several days/weeks or recurring
symptomChecker.feverError: Please select at least one sub-symptom
symptomChecker.mouthTitle: Oral Sores in Mouth or Nose Area
symptomChecker.mouthSubtitle: On the palate, gums, or inside the nose
symptomChecker.mouthWarning: Not caused by biting, braces, medication, or food.
symptomChecker.hairWarning: In the area of hair loss, there are no scabs, pus, or permanent scars. There are short and brittle hairs along the forehead hairline (Lupus Hair).
symptomChecker.seizureSubtitle: Seizures not caused by other conditions
symptomChecker.seizureWarning1: Not due to epilepsy, severe electrolyte disorders, very low blood sugar (hypoglycemia), or infection.
symptomChecker.seizureWarning2: Not due to medications, alcohol, or illegal substances.
symptomChecker.jointSubtitle: Joint pain at one or more points
symptomChecker.jointSubMultiple: Occurs at 2 or more joint points
symptomChecker.jointWarningTrauma: Not caused by recent falls, impacts, or excessive physical activity.
symptomChecker.jointWarningGout: Not currently diagnosed with gout or joint calcification.
symptomChecker.jointSubStiff: Joints feel stiff, heavy, or difficult to move in the morning
symptomChecker.jointError: Please select at least one sub-symptom

symptomTracker.title: Symptom Tracker
symptomTracker.emptyDesc: Start tracking your skin symptoms to monitor changes over time. Consistent tracking helps you and your doctor spot patterns early.

trackerModal.title: Add New Entry
trackerModal.dragDrop: Drag & drop or click to upload
trackerModal.describePlaceholder: Describe the symptom appearance, sensation, size...
trackerModal.errorImageType: Please upload an image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP)

trackerDelete.title: Delete this entry?
trackerDelete.desc: This will permanently remove this tracker entry. This action cannot be undone.

activityTracker.title: Activity Tracker
activityTracker.subtitle: SLEDAI-2K disease activity records
activityTracker.createSubtitle: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus Disease Activity Index 2000
activityTracker.errorSave: Unable to save assessment. Please try again.
activityTracker.emptyDesc: Record your first SLEDAI-2K assessment to start tracking disease activity.
activityTracker.screeningDisclaimer: This screening tool does not replace professional medical diagnosis. Please consult a licensed physician for evaluation.

scanResult.title: Analysis Result
scanResult.subtitle: Based on our AI model's analysis
scanResult.recommendConsult: We recommend discussing your results with our AI assistant for further guidance on symptoms and next steps.
scanResult.noIndicators: No indicators found. If you have concerns, please consult a physician. You can also try scanning a different image for comparison.
